exported_funcs.name: CanonicalEntityID
exported_funcs.signature: CanonicalEntityID(repoID, relativePath, entityType, entityName string, lineNumber int) string

telemetry: none — Postgres writer adapters in internal/storage/postgres add histograms
key_invariants: CanonicalEntityID lower-cases entityType and trims all inputs before hashing with BLAKE2s; produces 'content-entity:e_<12-hex>' prefix
Clone methods on Record, EntityRecord, Materialization produce copy-safe values safe to retain in async paths
LoadWriterConfig rejects non-positive sizes and values above MaxContentEntityBatchSize (4000) to stay under Postgres bind-parameter limit
MemoryWriter.Write stores a Clone — it never retains the raw input
